scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --external:@neondatabase/serverless --external:kysely --external:ws --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --external:@neondatabase/serverless --external:kysely --external:ws --outfile=dist/index.mjs && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.format: oxfmt --write package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json ava.config.js src tests
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.build.json ava.config.js src tests
scripts.lint: pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && oxlint --deny-warnings --allow eslint/require-yield --type-aware --tsconfig tsconfig.json src tests
scripts.check: pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test
